title: pycnanthemum muticum var. pilosum
intro: Pycnanthemum muticum var. pilosum, also known as a variety of Mountain Mint, is a plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Pycnanthemum muticum var. pilosum include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and act as a natural expectorant to relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
